events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes aluminum conductors on a device not rated CO/ALR. This is a code violation - aluminum conductors must be connected to devices rated CO/ALR (Copper/Aluminum Revised) to prevent fire hazards from galvanic corrosion and loose connections. This is a fail.

  "rationale": "Aluminum conductors connected to devices not rated CO/ALR are non-compliant and create a known fire hazard due to differential expansion, oxidation, and loose terminations.
